pi_items.source: Code analysis of setup_task.sh which creates and populates this directory.
Code analysis of verifier.py which returns passed = score >= 90.
Code analysis of setup_task.sh reveals that these exact three bugs are explicitly injected into control/evapotranspiration.py, control/scheduler.py, and control/sensors.py.

privileged_info_summary: The task takes place in the synthetic project directory /home/ga/PycharmProjects/smart_irrigate. The verifier requires a score of at least 90 to pass. The project contains exactly three intentionally injected bugs: a sign error in the Hargreaves ETo calculation formula, an inverted logic check for rain probability, and a crash when aggregating sensor readings containing None values.
